'''pahocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampful|swampful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampful|swampful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pahocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæhecheth|pæhecheth]] || [[word:pæhechej|pæhechej]] || [[word:pæhechesh|pæhechesh]] || [[word:pæheche|pæheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pahohochoth|pahohochoth]] || [[word:pahohochoj|pahohochoj]] || [[word:pahohochosh|pahohochosh]] || [[word:pahohocho|pahohocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pahochoth|pahochoth]] || [[word:pahochoj|pahochoj]] || [[word:pahochosh|pahochosh]] || [[word:pahocho|pahocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pahofchoth|pahofchoth]] || [[word:pahofchoj|pahofchoj]] || [[word:pahofchosh|pahofchosh]] || [[word:pahofchof|pahofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pahochotho|pahochotho]] || [[word:pahochojo|pahochojo]] || [[word:pahochosho|pahochosho]] || [[word:pahochoko|pahochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pahochoth|pahochoth]] || [[word:pahochoj|pahochoj]] || [[word:pahochosh|pahochosh]] || [[word:pahocho|pahocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pahochothol|pahochothol]] || [[word:pahochojol|pahochojol]] || [[word:pahochoshol|pahochoshol]] || [[word:pahochokol|pahochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pahochothotho|pahochothotho]] || [[word:pahochojojo|pahochojojo]] || [[word:pahochoshosho|pahochoshosho]] || [[word:pahochoko|pahochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pahochothon|pahochothon]] || [[word:pahochojon|pahochojon]] || [[word:pahochoshon|pahochoshon]] || [[word:pahochokon|pahochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pahochothoro|pahochothoro]] || [[word:pahochojoro|pahochojoro]] || [[word:pahochoshoro|pahochoshoro]] || [[word:pahochokoro|pahochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
